property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Users\qasar\.p2\pool\plugins\org.eclipse.justj.openjdk.hotspot.jre.full.win32.x86_64_21.0.9.v20251105-0741\jre\bin;C:\windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\windows\system32;C:\windows;C:/Users/qasar/.p2/pool/plugins/org.eclipse.justj.openjdk.hotspot.jre.full.win32.x86_64_21.0.9.v20251105-0741/jre/bin/server;C:/Users/qasar/.p2/pool/plugins/org.eclipse.justj.openjdk.hotspot.jre.full.win32.x86_64_21.0.9.v20251105-0741/jre/bin;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\windows\system32;C:\windows;C:\windows\System32\Wbem;C:\windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA App\NvDLISR;C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files\HP\OMEN-Broadcast\Common;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.12\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Users\qasar\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;;C:\windows\system32;;.

testcase.name: TC01 - Verify user can login with valid credentials
testcase.error: io.cucumber.core.runner.DuplicateStepDefinitionException: Duplicate step definitions in com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.the_response_body_should_contain_a_valid(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) and
